allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Instagram:', !!l.Instagram\); console.log\('Youtube:', !!l.Youtube\); console.log\('Twitter:', !!l.Twitter\);")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /instagram|youtube|twitter|tiktok|facebook|social|brand/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names\);")
